title: HX4 8LR, Calder Remediation Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/NP3329SN/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Calder Remediation Limited   Installation name: North Dean Waste Recovery Facility   Permit number: EPR/NP3329SN/A001   "
